workspace.renderError: 圖表無法渲染，請檢查語法後再試。
workspace.fallbackBody: 此工具頁已接入站點結構，專用渲染器會在下一階段補齊。
workspace.treeHint: 物件和陣列會展開成可讀的樹狀圖。

footer.summary: 面向開發文件、架構說明、產品規格和 AI 工作流的線上圖表預覽與轉換工具。

metadata.title: Diagram Preview Tools - Mermaid, PlantUML, Markdown, Graphviz Online
metadata.description: 線上預覽和轉換 Mermaid、PlantUML、Markdown、Graphviz、D2、draw.io、心智圖、JSON、YAML 和開發者圖表。

hero.subtitle: 線上預覽 Mermaid、PlantUML、Markdown、Graphviz、D2、draw.io、心智圖和開發者圖表。

why: Use one focused workspace for text diagrams, documentation previews, and file-based diagram formats.
Most rendering runs in the browser, keeping drafts fast while reducing unnecessary round trips.
Every tool has its own URL, metadata, related tools, and export actions so it can grow as a search-friendly utility.

faq.question: What can DiagramPreview render?
faq.answer: The first release focuses on Mermaid, PlantUML, Markdown, Graphviz, JSON, YAML, and structured preview pages for the remaining diagram formats.

faq.question: Do diagrams upload to a server?
faq.answer: Browser-first tools render locally when possible. PlantUML uses a server URL in the first version so the renderer can be replaced later.

faq.question: Can I export diagrams?
faq.answer: Supported renderers expose SVG, PNG, copy, and print-style PDF actions from the workspace toolbar.

mermaid-preview.name: Mermaid Preview
mermaid-preview.shortDescription: Mermaid Preview 的線上預覽工作區，支援範例、語法檢查和匯出操作。
mermaid-preview.seoDescription: 使用 Mermaid Preview 線上預覽、檢查和整理開發者圖表，支援範例、錯誤提示和匯出流程。
mermaid-preview.intro: 在專業工具工作區中編寫或貼上內容，立即使用 Mermaid Preview 檢查圖表、文件或資料結構。
mermaid-preview.placeholder: 在這裡貼上 Mermaid Preview 內容...
mermaid-preview.emptyPreview: Mermaid Preview 的預覽結果會顯示在這裡。

flowchart.label: Flowchart
flowchart.code:
flowchart TD
  A[Start] --> B{Ready?}
  B -- Yes --> C[Preview diagram]
  B -- No --> D[Edit source]
  D --> B
  C --> E[Export]

sequence.label: Sequence
sequence.code:
sequenceDiagram
  participant User
  participant App
  participant API
  User->>App: Paste diagram
  App->>API: Validate request
  API-->>App: OK
  App-->>User: Render preview

class.label: Class
class.code:
classDiagram
  class Diagram {
    +string source
    +render()
    +exportSvg()
  }
  class MermaidDiagram
  Diagram <|-- MermaidDiagram

state.label: State
state.code:
stateDiagram-v2
  [*] --> Editing
  Editing --> Rendering
  Rendering --> Ready
  Rendering --> Error
  Error --> Editing
  Ready --> Exported

gantt.label: Gantt
gantt.code:
gantt
  title Release plan
  dateFormat  YYYY-MM-DD
  section Build
  Scaffold app :done, a1, 2026-06-01, 2d
  Tool preview :active, a2, after a1, 4d
  SEO pages :a3, after a2, 2d

faq.answer: 可以。此頁面已接入 DiagramPreview 的瀏覽器工作區。

seoBody: Mermaid Preview 適合需要快速檢查圖表或結構化內容的開發者、產品經理和技術寫作者。
工作區將原始內容和預覽結果放在同一頁，方便在發布前發現語法、層級或布局問題。
此工具頁具備獨立 URL、metadata、FAQ 和相關工具入口，適合長期沉澱為可搜尋的工具頁。

mermaid.label: Mermaid block
mermaid.code:
# Checkout flow

```mermaid
sequenceDiagram
  participant Buyer
  participant Store
  Buyer->>Store: Place order
  Store-->>Buyer: Confirmation
```

The diagram is rendered inside the Markdown preview.

api.label: API call
api.code:
sequenceDiagram
  participant Client
  participant API
  participant DB
  Client->>API: GET /diagrams
  API->>DB: Query diagrams
  DB-->>API: Rows
  API-->>Client: JSON

login.label: Login flow
login.code:
sequenceDiagram
  participant User
  participant App
  participant Auth
  User->>App: Enter credentials
  App->>Auth: Verify
  Auth-->>App: Token
  App-->>User: Dashboard

payment.label: Payment flow
payment.code:
sequenceDiagram
  participant Buyer
  participant Store
  participant PSP
  Buyer->>Store: Checkout
  Store->>PSP: Create payment
  PSP-->>Store: Confirmed
  Store-->>Buyer: Receipt

ai-diagram-generator.seoDescription: 用自然語言提示詞生成 Mermaid 圖表。
ai-diagram-generator.intro: 描述你想要的圖表，選擇 Mermaid 圖表類型，讓 AI 生成可編輯源碼並即時預覽。
ai-diagram-generator.emptyPreview: 描述你想要的圖表，選擇 Mermaid 圖表類型，讓 AI 生成可編輯源碼並即時預覽。

system.label: System flow
system.prompt: Create a system architecture flow for a web app with browser, API gateway, auth service, billing service, queue, worker, database, and object storage.

api.label: API flow
api.prompt: Create a sequence diagram for a client calling an API, API validating auth, reading database records, and returning JSON.

product.label: Product journey
product.prompt: Create a product onboarding flow with signup, email verification, workspace creation, first diagram preview, export, and feedback.

ai.existingCodePlaceholder: 貼上要修復的 Mermaid 程式碼...
ai.generatedCodeLabel: 生成的 Mermaid 程式碼

howToUse: 用自然語言描述目標圖表。
選擇 Mermaid 圖表類型並呼叫 AI 生成程式碼。
檢查 Mermaid 輸出，必要時編輯，然後匯出 SVG 或 PNG。

faq.question: 會使用哪個 AI 供應商？
faq.answer: 服務端優先呼叫 Gemini；當 Gemini 不可用、限流或未配置時，會回退到 DeepSeek。

faq.question: 會使用哪個 AI 供應商？
faq.answer: 服務端優先呼叫 Gemini；當 Gemini 不可用、限流或未配置時，會回退到 DeepSeek。

seoBody: 用自然語言提示詞生成 Mermaid 圖表。
描述你想要的圖表，選擇 Mermaid 圖表類型，讓 AI 生成可編輯源碼並即時預覽。
服務端優先呼叫 Gemini；當 Gemini 不可用、限流或未配置時，會回退到 DeepSeek。

text-to-mermaid.name: 文字轉 Mermaid
text-to-mermaid.shortDescription: 把產品說明、事故記錄和架構文字轉換成 Mermaid 圖表。
text-to-mermaid.seoDescription: 把產品說明、事故記錄和架構文字轉換成 Mermaid 圖表。
text-to-mermaid.intro: 貼上需求、筆記或流程描述，將普通文字轉換成可預覽和匯出的 Mermaid 程式碼。
text-to-mermaid.emptyPreview: 貼上需求、筆記或流程描述，將普通文字轉換成可預覽和匯出的 Mermaid 程式碼。

requirements.label: Requirements
requirements.prompt: Users paste diagram code, the app validates syntax, renders a preview, allows export, and suggests related tools.

incident.label: Incident
incident.prompt: A customer reports a broken export. Support checks logs, engineering reproduces, a fix is deployed, and support confirms resolution.

architecture.label: Architecture
architecture.prompt: Browser sends source text to a Next.js API route. The API calls Gemini first, falls back to DeepSeek, then returns Mermaid code for browser preview.

mermaid-ai-fixer.name: Mermaid AI 修復器
mermaid-ai-fixer.shortDescription: 用 AI 修復 Mermaid 語法並提升圖表可讀性。
mermaid-ai-fixer.seoDescription: 用 AI 修復 Mermaid 語法並提升圖表可讀性。
mermaid-ai-fixer.intro: 貼上有問題的 Mermaid 程式碼和修復要求，AI 會返回修正後的 Mermaid 源碼。
mermaid-ai-fixer.emptyPreview: 貼上有問題的 Mermaid 程式碼和修復要求，AI 會返回修正後的 Mermaid 源碼。

brokenFlow.label: Broken flow
brokenFlow.prompt: Fix the syntax and keep the same flow.
brokenFlow.code:
flowchart TD
  A[Start --> B{Ready?}
  B -- yes --> C[Render]
  B -- no --> D[Edit]

brokenSequence.label: Broken sequence
brokenSequence.prompt: Fix this sequence diagram and keep the participants.
brokenSequence.code:
sequenceDiagram
  participant User
  participant App
  User->App: Paste source
  App--User: Preview

brokenState.label: Broken state
brokenState.code:
stateDiagram-v2
  [*] --> Editing
  Editing -> Rendering
  Rendering --> Ready
  Rendering --> Error
  Error -> Editing

openapi-to-sequence.name: OpenAPI 转序列图
openapi-to-sequence.shortDescription: 在本地把 OpenAPI paths 转成 Mermaid 序列图。
openapi-to-sequence.seoDescription: 在本地把 OpenAPI paths 转成 Mermaid 序列图。
openapi-to-sequence.intro: 粘贴 OpenAPI JSON 或 YAML，把 API 操作转换为解释请求处理过程的序列图。
openapi-to-sequence.placeholder: 在这里粘贴 OpenAPI JSON 或 YAML...
openapi-to-sequence.emptyPreview: 你的 API 序列图会显示在这里。

petstore.label: 寵物 API
petstore.code:
openapi: 3.0.3
info:
  title: Pet Store
  version: 1.0.0
paths:
  /pets:
    get:
      summary: List pets
    post:
      summary: Create pet
  /pets/{petId}:
    get:
      summary: Get pet details
    delete:
      summary: Delete pet

auth.label: 認證 API
auth.code:
openapi: 3.1.0
info:
  title: Auth Service
  version: 1.0.0
paths:
  /login:
    post:
      summary: Validate credentials
  /sessions/{id}:
    get:
      summary: Read session
    delete:
      summary: Revoke session

orders.label: 訂單 API
orders.code:
openapi: 3.0.0
info:
  title: Orders
  version: 1.0.0
paths:
  /orders:
    post:
      summary: Create order
  /orders/{orderId}/pay:
    post:
      summary: Start payment
  /orders/{orderId}/shipments:
    get:
      summary: List shipments

howToUse: 把源文本粘贴到编辑器。
检查生成的可视化结果。
输入调整到满意后，导出 SVG 或 PNG。

faq.question: 这个工具会用 AI 吗？
faq.answer: 不会。解析和可视化在浏览器本地完成。

seoBody: 在本地把 OpenAPI paths 转成 Mermaid 序列图。
粘贴 OpenAPI JSON 或 YAML，把 API 操作转换为解释请求处理过程的序列图。
DiagramPreview keeps the workflow editable so you can revise the source and regenerate the visualization quickly.

architecture-diagram-generator.shortDescription: 用 AI 从产品或系统说明生成 Mermaid 架构图。

architecture-diagram-generator.intro: 描述系统架构，生成可编辑的 Mermaid 图，覆盖服务、队列、数据库、客户端和外部集成。
architecture-diagram-generator.emptyPreview: 描述系统架构，生成可编辑的 Mermaid 图，覆盖服务、队列、数据库、客户端和外部集成。

saas.label: SaaS 架构
saas.prompt: Design a SaaS architecture with browser, CDN, Next.js app, API gateway, auth service, billing service, worker queue, PostgreSQL, Redis, object storage, and email provider.

eventDriven.label: 事件驱动
eventDriven.prompt: Create an event-driven order platform with checkout API, order service, payment provider, event bus, inventory service, shipping service, analytics pipeline, and data warehouse.

edge.label: 边缘部署
edge.prompt: Show an edge image processing architecture with users, edge cache, upload API, job queue, image workers, object storage, metadata database, and webhook callbacks.

howToUse: 用自然语言描述目标图表。
选择图表类型并用 AI 生成代码。
检查输出，必要时编辑，然后导出或复制源码。

faq.question: 使用哪个 AI 服务？
faq.answer: 服务端会先尝试 Gemini，Gemini 不可用、限流或未配置时回退到 DeepSeek。

faq.question: API Key 会暴露给浏览器吗？
faq.answer: 不会。密钥只通过服务端环境变量读取。

seoBody: 用 AI 从产品或系统说明生成 Mermaid 架构图。
描述系统架构，生成可编辑的 Mermaid 图，覆盖服务、队列、数据库、客户端和外部集成。
服务端会先尝试 Gemini，Gemini 不可用、限流或未配置时回退到 DeepSeek。

ai-plantuml-generator.name: AI PlantUML 生成器
ai-plantuml-generator.shortDescription: 通过 Gemini 和 DeepSeek 兜底从自然语言生成 PlantUML。
ai-plantuml-generator.seoDescription: 通过 Gemini 和 DeepSeek 兜底从自然语言生成 PlantUML。
ai-plantuml-generator.intro: 描述序列图、组件图、类图、活动图、用例图或状态图，生成可编辑 PlantUML 源码。
ai-plantuml-generator.emptyPreview: 描述序列图、组件图、类图、活动图、用例图或状态图，生成可编辑 PlantUML 源码。

sequence.label: 序列图
sequence.prompt: Create a PlantUML sequence diagram for a user exporting a diagram as PNG: browser requests export, app renders SVG, conversion service creates PNG, and browser downloads the file.

component.label: 组件图
component.prompt: Create a PlantUML component diagram for DiagramPreview with web app, renderer modules, AI API route, Gemini provider, DeepSeek provider, and export utilities.

activity.label: 活动图
activity.prompt: Create a PlantUML activity diagram for validating pasted diagram code, rendering a preview, showing errors, and exporting if successful.

howToUse: 用自然语言描述目标图表。
选择图表类型并用 AI 生成代码。
检查输出，必要时编辑，然后导出或复制源码。

faq.answer: 不会。密钥只通过服务端环境变量读取。

seoBody: 通过 Gemini 和 DeepSeek 兜底从自然语言生成 PlantUML。
描述序列图、组件图、类图、活动图、用例图或状态图，生成可编辑 PlantUML 源码。
服务端会先尝试 Gemini，Gemini 不可用、限流或未配置时回退到 DeepSeek。

converters.title: 圖表轉換工具
converters.description: 把結構化文字和資料轉換成可讀圖表與可匯出預覽。

developer-diagrams.title: 開發者圖表
developer-diagrams.description: 為架構說明、API 流程、依賴圖和工程文件建立圖表。

data-visualizers.title: 資料視覺化
data-visualizers.description: 把 JSON、YAML 和結構化資料檢查成可讀樹狀圖。

ai-diagram.title: AI 圖表工具
ai-diagram.description: 複核、調整並匯出 AI 生成的文字圖表。

index.title: 面向開發者的圖表指南
index.description: 關於線上預覽、轉換、匯出和撰寫圖表文件的實用指南。
index.seoTitle: 面向開發者的圖表指南 - DiagramPreview

mermaid-preview-guide.title: Mermaid 線上預覽指南
mermaid-preview-guide.seoTitle: Mermaid 線上預覽指南 - DiagramPreview
mermaid-preview-guide.description: Mermaid 線上預覽指南：關於線上預覽、轉換、匯出和撰寫圖表文件的實用指南。
mermaid-preview-guide.excerpt: 關於線上預覽、轉換、匯出和撰寫圖表文件的實用指南。

sections.heading: 工作流建議
paragraphs: DiagramPreview 將源內容、預覽結果、相關工具和匯出動作放在同一個工作區中，適合技術文件、架構說明和 AI 生成內容複核。
建議先從範例開始，逐步修改源內容，再檢查預覽和匯出結果。

sections.heading: 發布前檢查
paragraphs: 保留原始文字和匯出圖片，可以讓後續修改更容易審閱。
如果圖表來自 AI，先檢查節點命名、方向、分組和關鍵業務含義。

建議先從範例開始，逐步修改源內容，再檢查預覽和匯出結果。

sections.heading: 發布前檢查
paragraphs: 保留原始文字和匯出圖片，可以讓後續修改更容易審閱。
如果圖表來自 AI，先檢查節點命名、方向、分組和關鍵業務含義。

about.title: About
about.description: DiagramPreview is an online diagram preview and conversion workspace for developers, product teams, architects, and technical writers.

sections.heading: What DiagramPreview is
paragraphs: DiagramPreview helps people turn text, structured data, and diagram files into visual previews that are easier to inspect, share, and export.
The site is built for Mermaid, PlantUML, Markdown, Graphviz, D2, draw.io, mind maps, JSON, YAML, and future developer diagram formats.

sections.heading: How the product is designed
paragraphs: The first screen focuses on tools, search, and categories instead of a marketing-only landing page. Each tool has its own URL, metadata, related links, FAQ, and export workflow.

help-center.title: Help Center
help-center.description: Find help for using DiagramPreview tools, previews, exports, and common diagram workflows.

sections.heading: Using tools
paragraphs: Open a tool, paste source content, choose an example when useful, and review the preview pane for output or syntax errors.
Supported tools expose copy, SVG, PNG, and print-style PDF actions when the renderer can provide them.

sections.heading: Troubleshooting
paragraphs: If a diagram does not render, reduce the source to a smaller example, check the syntax for the format, and then add sections back gradually.
For PlantUML, the first version uses a PlantUML server URL, so network access to that endpoint may affect previews.

contact.title: Contact
contact.description: Contact DiagramPreview for feedback, support, partnerships, and product questions.

sections.heading: Email
paragraphs: For feedback, write to feedback@diagrampreview.com. For general contact, write to hello@diagrampreview.com.

sections.heading: What to include
paragraphs: Please include the tool URL, the diagram format, a short description of the issue, and whether the problem affects preview, export, localization, or SEO content.

sections.heading: Data handling
paragraphs: DiagramPreview is designed as a browser-first tool site. Where possible, rendering happens in the browser rather than requiring diagram content to be sent to a backend.
Some third-party rendering approaches, such as the first PlantUML server URL implementation, may request a remote preview image.

sections.heading: Contact
paragraphs: For privacy questions, contact hello@diagrampreview.com. This page is a practical product policy page and should be reviewed by legal counsel before commercial launch.

terms-of-use.title: Terms of Use
terms-of-use.description: Terms for using DiagramPreview tools and content.

sections.heading: Use of the service
paragraphs: DiagramPreview provides online tools for previewing, converting, and exporting diagrams. You are responsible for the content you paste, upload, preview, or export.
Do not use the service to process content you are not allowed to use or share.

sections.heading: No warranty
paragraphs: The tools are provided as-is. Renderers, exports, examples, and documentation may change as the product evolves.
This page is a practical starting point and should be reviewed by legal counsel before commercial launch.
